name: rohingosling-skills
description: Rohin Gosling's curated collection of publicly-shared Claude Code Agent Skills, each packaged as an installable plugin — ASCII diagram renderers for Markdown documentation.

plugins.name: g-render-ascii-dependency-graph
plugins.description: Render an ASCII dependency graph from a JSON structure (horizontal/vertical links, ellipsis markers) for markdown documentation.

plugins.name: g-render-ascii-hierarchy-diagram
plugins.description: Generate a hierarchical ASCII tree diagram from a JSON structure (folder trees, decomposition diagrams) with aligned comments and two layout modes.

plugins.name: g-render-ascii-memory-map
plugins.description: Render an ASCII box-drawing memory map (address-space layout diagram) from a JSON structure, for any architecture (Commodore, x86 segmented, ARM/MCU, flat 32/64-bit). Multiple address formats and size-proportional block heights.
